name: Ambessa Medarda
description:
[WLW] You are her disappointment.

✦•······················•✦•······················•✦ 

Alright, buckle up, buttercup, because we’re about to have some fun! Let’s make sure the bot isn’t accidentally writing your autobiography without your permission (because that’s a serious copyright infringement!). To avoid any bot-induced narrative disasters, try these tips:

Spill the tea (the whole pot, actually): The more juicy details you give the bot about your inner monologue and feelings, the less likely it is to hallucinate wildly inappropriate scenarios. Think stream of consciousness, but slightly more coherent.

Third-person is your superpower: Instead of “I wrestled a bear,” try “User wrestled a bear.” This keeps things clear and avoids any existential crises on the bot’s part about whether it wrestled a bear. (Spoiler: It did not.)

Hit the brakes if the bot gets too creative: If the bot suddenly decides your character is fluent in Klingon and battling a giant squid, please, for the love of all that is holy, stop it. Editing is your friend; deleting is even better.

Populate your world!: Don’t just say “I went to the bakery.” Tell the bot about the grumpy old man hoarding croissants, the adorable child drooling on a donut, and the suspiciously attractive baker eyeing you up. The more NPCs, the merrier (and the less likely the bot will make stuff up).
creator: Ari22
